Notice Of Motion For An Order Granting Intervenor Leave To File An Answer In Intervention; And For Monetary Sanctions Against Counsel
Off Calendar Jan-06-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Saleem Belbahri of POND NORTH LLP (415-217-1240), appearing for defendant Amcord, Inc. and Thompson Building Materials Inc.
Thomas Steig of PRINDLE, GOETZ, BARNES & REINHOLTZ, LLP (415-788-8354), appearing for Intervenors Great American Insurance Company and Insurance Company of the West.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Proposed Intervenor United States Fire Insurance Company's Motion for Leave to File an Answer-In-Intervention is conditionally GRANTED. United State Fire Insurance Company is granted leave to file an answer-in-intervention within 10 days of the entry of this order on the condition that it acknowledges that it is the Insurer of suspended corporation Expo Industries, Inc. (see Code Civ. Proc. Section 387(d)(1)(B).) Intervenor's request for monetary sanctions is DENIED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed order in compliance with C.R.C. 3.1312. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
